name: Monday.com
one_liner: Work OS / project management platform whose GraphQL Platform API lets agents read and modify boards, items, columns, users, workspaces, docs, and more.
primary_auth: OAuth2 for distributed apps; personal V2 API token for single-account/server-side use.
access_notes: Full GraphQL API access is included on the Free plan (2 users) and all paid plans. A personal V2 API token is available instantly from the user's Developers section (profile > Developers > API token > Show) with no payment or approval. OAuth apps can be self-registered in the developer center. Rate limits are complexity-based; extra daily API call capacity is a paid add-on but base access is free.
api_notes: Single GraphQL endpoint at https://api.monday.com/v2 covering boards, items, column values, subitems, groups, users, teams, workspaces, folders, docs, updates, notifications, assets/files, webhooks, and automations. Queries and mutations across these resources put it comfortably at 100+ operations. Workforms not yet supported.
mcp_notes: monday.com ships official MCP servers maintained by its AI team. The platform data MCP (@mondaydotcomorg/monday-api-mcp) exposes ~20 tools over boards/items/columns/updates, and a separate 'monday apps MCP' (@mondaydotcomorg/monday-api-mcp app-tools, ~12 tools) manages apps/features/deployments. Repo: github.com/mondaycom/mcp. A community server by Jovan Sakovic also exists but the vendor ships its own.
main_blocker: None material. API access is free and self-serve via personal token; only friction is complexity-based rate limits with a paid add-on for high-volume usage.

evidence.claim: GraphQL API uses token-based auth (personal V2 tokens) plus OAuth; single endpoint https://api.monday.com/v2 with Authorization header.
API handles operations across boards, items, column values, users, workspaces and more via GraphQL.
monday.com ships an official MCP server enabling AI agents secure access to its data and actions.
Official monday apps MCP package @mondaydotcomorg/monday-api-mcp is maintained by monday.com.
API access is included on the Free plan and all paid plans; extra daily API calls sold as an add-on.

open_questions: Exact operation count is inferred from documented resource coverage rather than an enumerated list; Workforms and some newer product surfaces are not covered by the API.
